steps.t: Tham Lorn, in the western Fields of Fornost, can be reached by taking the horse from Mincham's Camp. You should travel to Tham Lorn to confront Olnath…
Olnathron can be found to the west of the graves of his wife and child. Fearing for the strength of his will, Mincham has asked you to find and confro…
Mincham awaits you at his camp. Mincham will be relieved to learn that the fell spirit Olnathron has been sent back to the abyss.
